svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="第 1 页" id="6uc86bscgia1fQHZqkB7"> <mxGraphModel dx="2943" dy="1506" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "graph TD
 %% Node Style Definitions
 classDef io fill:#5c3a21,stroke:#d79b00,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff;
 classDef fsm fill:#4d3b00,stroke:#d79b00,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff;
 classDef sponge fill:#1e3c5a,stroke:#6c8ebf,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff;
 classDef datapath fill:#1c3d19,stroke:#82b366,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff;
 classDef statebank fill:#422a4c,stroke:#9673a6,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff;

 %% Global Signals
 subgraph Global_Signals [\"Global Clocks & Resets\"]
 CLK([\"clk\"]):::io
 RST([\"rst_n\"]):::io
 end

 subgraph FSM_Block [\"Controller\"]
 FSM[\"Global Low-Power FSM\n(Absorb / 24-Round / Squeeze Scheduler)\"]:::fsm
 end

 subgraph Sponge_Wrapper [\"SHA-3 Sponge Wrapper\"]
 RAW_IN([\"Raw Msg In\"]):::io --> PAD[\"Input FIFO & Padding\n(10*1 Pad & Domain Separation)\"]:::sponge
 PAD -- \"padded_data [63:0]\" --> XOR_ABSORB[\"Absorb XOR Logic\"]:::sponge
 SQUEEZE_OUT[\"Output Formatter\"]:::sponge --> HASH_OUT([\"Hash Result Out\"]):::io
 end

 subgraph Keccak_Core [\"Keccak 64-bit Lane-Serial ULP Core\"]
 %% MUX changed back to standard hardware Trapezoid shape
 XOR_ABSORB -- \"absorb_data [63:0]\" --> MUX_IN[/\"MUX_IN (2-to-1)\"\]:::datapath
 
 MUX_IN -- \"write_data\" --> STATE_BANK[\"1600-bit State Bank\n(25 x 64-bit Gated Registers)\"]:::statebank
 
 %% Squeeze Path
 STATE_BANK -- \"read_data\" --> SQUEEZE_OUT
 
 %% 24-Round Datapath
 STATE_BANK -- \"read_data (64b / 320b)\" --> THETA[\"Theta Unit\n(Parity XOR Tree + C/D Regs)\"]:::datapath
 THETA --> RHO_PI[\"Rho/Pi Unit\n(Fixed Wire Rotation & Remap MUX)\"]:::datapath
 RHO_PI --> CHI[\"Chi Unit\n(Row Temp Reg + Non-linear Logic)\"]:::datapath
 CHI --> IOTA[\"Iota Unit\n(Round Constant Injector)\"]:::datapath
 
 %% Feedback Loop
 IOTA -- \"feedback_data\" --> MUX_IN
 
 %% Absorb XOR Feedback
 STATE_BANK -- \"state_feedback\" --> XOR_ABSORB
 end

 %% Clock and Reset Routing (Solid lines)
 CLK --> FSM
 RST --> FSM
 CLK --> STATE_BANK
 RST --> STATE_BANK
 CLK --> THETA
 RST --> THETA
 CLK --> CHI
 RST --> CHI

 %% Control Signals Routing (Solid lines)
 FSM -- \"mux_sel\" --> MUX_IN
 FSM -- \"lane_write_en [24:0]\n(Clock Gating)\" --> STATE_BANK
 FSM -- \"read_addr / write_addr\" --> STATE_BANK
 FSM -- \"datapath_ctrl\n(Reg Enable)\" --> THETA
 FSM -- \"datapath_ctrl\n(Reg Enable)\" --> CHI
 FSM -- \"round_const [63:0]\" --> IOTA

 %% Force all lines to be solid white-ish to avoid dark-mode inversion
 linkStyle default stroke:#fffffe,stroke-width:3px,fill:none;",
 "config": null
}" id="SRg6l3N4BOvvE8hANFO8-1"> <mxCell connectable="0" parent="1" style="group;transparentBounds=1;editIcon=1;lockedGroup=0;groupPadding=10;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
